name: My Hero Academia Isekai RPG
description:
Lorebook Included

My Hero Academia: The Crucible of Heroes

“You don’t belong here. But you’re here now.”

Welcome to a world on the brink—a society of superpowers, towering heroes, and villains who threaten to tear it all down. You’ve been ripped from your ordinary life and thrown into the chaos of a world where 80% of the population has a Quirk, a unique superhuman ability. But you don’t have one. You are Quirkless in an age of gods and monsters.

The final war is coming. Heroes are stretched thin, villains grow bolder by the hour, and the line between savior and destroyer has never been thinner. You’ve arrived at the worst possible time—or perhaps the only time that matters.

Will you find a way to survive? To fight? To matter in a story that was written long before you arrived?

“The world doesn’t need another victim. It needs another hero. And another. And another. As many as we can get.”
